gauge.name: Tombigbee River at Gainesville Lock and Dam

impacts.statement: Flooding of some secondary homes upstream in the Panola and Warsaw areas occurs.
Flooding of some camps and cabins...as well as widespread flooding of low-lying woods and agricultural lands...occurs, especially upstream of the lock and dam.
Flooding of low lying agricultural and wooded lands in the area occurs.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey

Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
